SN_FleetBuilder.include_player_tooltip: Includes everything seen in the Character tab
SN_FleetBuilder.include_abilitybar_tooltip:
This will also save and add abilities that aren't in your ability bar.

Depending on the implementation of a modded ability, this can in rare cases cause a crash.
If that happens, untoggle this option.

SN_FleetBuilder.goal_variant_reserved_tooltip:
This slot is reserved for goal variants.

If a game or mod update adds or removes goal variants, it could shift other loadouts, potentially causing confusion.
Reserving this slot prevents that.

You can disable this reservation in the LunaLib settings.
SN_FleetBuilder.click_and_drag_to_empty_slot_to_save: Click and drag to an empty slot to save
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_use_cargo_tooltip: Use weapons and fighter LPCs from your fleet's cargo holds.
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_use_storage_tooltip: Use weapons and fighter LPCs from your local storage facilities.
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_use_market_tooltip:
Buy weapons and fighter LPCs from market, if docked at one.

Ordnance from your cargo will be preferred
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_use_black_market_tooltip:
Buy weapons and fighter LPCs from the black market.

Non-black-market options will be preferred if the alternatives are of equal quality
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_upgrade_weapons_tooltip:
Use weapons better than the ones specified in the goal variant, if there are ordnance points left to mount them.

Will add flux vents and capacitors up to the amount number specified in the goal variant first, then upgrade weapons, and then add more vents and some common hullmods.

Leaving some unspent ordnance points in a goal variant can help take advantage of this option.
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_strip_before_autofit_tooltip:
Remove everything possible prior to autofitting: generally results in a better fit.

However, refitting outside of port reduces a ship's combat readiness, and this option tends to lead to more changes and more readiness loss.
SN_FleetBuilder.toggle_apply_smods_tooltip:
Spend story points to apply SMods to your ship.

If S-mods are installed, the autofit cannot be undone.
SN_FleetBuilder.dialog_apply_smods_title: Use Story Points to Apply SMods
SN_FleetBuilder.dialog_apply_smods_desc_one: This will consume %d Story point and give %d bonus xp
SN_FleetBuilder.dialog_apply_smods_desc_many: This will consume %d Story points and give %d bonus xp
